faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Highbridge apartments?
faqs.answer: Highbridge residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants often enter through foundation cracks, while odorous house ants are attracted to kitchens and food sources. Carpenter ants can be found in older buildings with moisture issues. Our technicians identify the species and apply targeted treatments for effective elimination.
